dict.string: en
HivecrewGuestAgent
HivecrewGuestAgent
com.hivecrew.guestagent
HivecrewGuestAgent
APPL
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to app data so it can automate workflows that read and operate on files created by other macOS apps inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to installed app bundles so it can inspect and automate macOS applications inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent uses Apple Events to automate macOS apps inside the guest VM on your behalf.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to your music and audio data so it can inspect media libraries and automate audio-related workflows inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs calendar access so it can inspect and automate calendar workflows inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs camera access for guest workflows that capture images or video input.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs contacts access so it can read and automate contact-related workflows inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to Desktop files so it can automate guest workflows involving user documents.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to Documents so it can automate guest workflows involving user documents.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to Downloads so it can automate guest workflows involving downloaded files.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs location access for guest workflows that inspect or use location-aware features.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs microphone access for guest workflows that capture audio input.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to mounted network volumes so it can automate workflows involving files stored on network shares inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs photo library access so it can inspect and automate photo workflows inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs access to removable volumes so it can automate workflows involving external drives and media inside the guest VM.
HivecrewGuestAgent needs reminders access so it can inspect and automate reminder workflows inside the guest VM.
